title: Argo CD CRD
description: Argo CD CRD documents custom resource definitions material for Argo CD in the infrastructure domain. It is classified as an operation page for the workflow-system class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights Repository, SSH, Cluster, External, and AppProject, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include argo, cd, crd, argo cd crd, and argo-cd, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is infrastructure / workflow / argo-cd / crd, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation.
